title: Build two-judge autonomous verifier rehearsal
goal: Build a local and Base Sepolia rehearsal where two verifier agents produce exact scoped EIP-712 attestations without human settlement approval.
acceptance_criteria: Two distinct verifier wallets are generated or injected without committing secrets.
Each attestation binds chain, bounty, round, solver, submission, evidence, policy, verdict, response, and deadline.
Known-good evidence reaches quorum; altered fields, replay, duplicate signer, expiry, and split verdict fail safely.
The harness records deterministic fixtures and redacted judge traces; no AI output directly broadcasts settlement.
The Base Sepolia runbook and CI-safe local tests are included.

verification_policy.rubric: Both verifier agents must independently confirm every acceptance criterion and all required deterministic checks from public evidence. Either may reject; only matching signatures settle.
